name: Nyra Voss
voice_line: The stars are not maps. They are warnings.

name: Cass Arden
trait: Delivers messages that arrive before they’re sent
voice_line: Don’t ask where I got this. Just read it.

name: Vera Ion
trait: Repairs robots with spare arcade parts
voice_line: If it sparks, I can fix it.

name: Taro Quill
voice_line: The city doesn’t sleep. It just changes channels.

name: Amaya Drift
trait: Keeps a notebook full of plants that shouldn’t exist
voice_line: If it grows here, it has a story. So do we.

name: Zilo Fern
voice_line: Trust me. That one only explodes sometimes.
